title: Sivers rusat över 1000 procent: "Har inte bevisat sig"
summary_md:
# Sivers rusat över 1000 procent: "Har inte bevisat sig"

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-05-05  
**Market Sentiment**: Negative

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

The episode centers on Sivers Semiconductors, whose share price has rocketed over 1100% since year-start to a ~15-16bn SEK market cap despite heavy losses and no revenue growth. The hosts are deeply skeptical, framing the move as speculative hype driven by short-term and professional momentum traders (drawing parallels to Fingerprint Cards), and note the company has yet to prove itself fundamentally ahead of its 20 May interim report. Brief market-cap and trading-volume comparisons are made to Billerud, Electrolux, Kinnevik, AstraZeneca and Investor.

---

## Universe Stocks

### ⛔ SIVE — Sivers Semiconductors | **AVOID** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 65%

Hosts see the 1100%+ rally as pure hype; latest report showed big loss and no revenue growth, valuation unjustified at ~16bn SEK.

#### Reasoning

The hosts are explicitly skeptical, saying Sivers 'har inte bevisat sig' and that no one would buy the business for 16bn SEK. The move is driven by momentum and intraday traders, not fundamentals. Heavy losses, recent dilutive rights issues, and reliance on ever-rising prices to print new shares make it fragile. They await the 20 May interim report to see if registered volumes show in numbers.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the 20 May interim report confirms continued losses and no revenue growth
- if momentum/short-term trading flows reverse
- if the company cannot fund itself without further dilution

> *"Det är ju fortfarande liksom inte bevisade. Tittar man på senaste rapporten så var det ju inte mycket omsättningsökning eller det var ju stor förlust och sådär. Så det är ju väldigt mycket en hype också."*

---
